problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photocatalytic. Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
